value.stringValue: A contact with this email already exists

fields.name: Display
fields.fieldText:
Please Note

There are no available Contacts to link to this Contact, please ensure Contacts are active and are not already set up. Alternatively if your contact does not exist create them using the button below:

fields.name: Text
fields.fieldText:
Please Note

No Contact/Site Links have been set up yet, use the button below to link Contacts to this Site for portal access

value.stringValue: IP_Contact__c:325, IP_PortalType__c:245, Name:180, IP_Job_Title__c:287, IP_Phone__c:208, Contact_Email__c:361
